title: XP-like HUD for BTA!
description: Changes the HUD to look like an experience bar from vanilla Minecraft.
body:
# Description

**XP-like HUD for BTA!** changes the HUD to look like an experience bar from vanilla Minecraft. Made for [Better than Adventure!](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/), unofficial fork of Minecraft beta 1.7.3

Originally I published this on Planet Minecraft and Better than Adventure!'s Discord server.

You can download XP-Like HUD for vanilla Minecraft [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xp-like-hud)!

![Showcase on 7.3_04](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e1ea6129e1f4e0da3c6d7b6a5dbff1ffbe252af.png)

## Contact

If you want contact me or report a bug, DM me on Discord @wixewsky or Telegram @wixewsky.
